name: data-analysis-for-feishu
tagline: ClawHub (66★): 📊 Powerful ECharts-based data visualization skill optimized for Feishu (Lark) ecosystem. Supports 12+ chart types, 6+ data s
verdict: Failure handling is nearly absent: the only nod to risk is a latency note about a first-run Chromium download, while missing files, bad sheet names, and permission errors during Excel work go completely unaddressed. Scope-exclusion language and version tracking are also missing.

highlights.summary: The only nod to a failure-prone step (first-run Chromium download) is a latency note, not a failure/fallback path; missing-file, bad-sheet-name, or permission-denied cases for Exce
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language appears anywhere in the description or body.
No version field in frontmatter and no '## Changelog' or dated revision section anywhere in the body; the v1.0.0 string only appears inside a release-asset download URL, not as a d
